privileged_info_summary: The task relies on dynamically generated, synthetic firewall log data, confirming 5,000 records compressed into /workspace/data/firewall_trace.csv.gz upon initialization. The objective requires logging into the database using 'hr'/'hr123' credentials to create the external table FIREWALL_LOGS_EXT and the view BLOCKED_TRAFFIC_SUMMARY, ultimately generating a report at /home/ga/Desktop/blocked_report.txt.
